value.rationale: The claim states that "Read-only commands run without a permission prompt." The page discusses sandboxing modes (auto-allow and regular permissions), filesystem isolation, and network isolation, but it does not contain any statement that read-only commands specifically run without a permission prompt. The page describes auto-allow mode where sandboxed commands run automatically, and various rules about which commands still prompt, but there is no mention of a "read-only commands" classification that bypasses permission prompts. The concept of read-only commands running without prompting is not asserted anywhere on the page.
